chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible for the Muhrim to Do and Use of All Types

text: 2684 - وَ سَأَلَهُ اَلْحَلَبِيُّ : عَنِ اَلْمُحْرِمِ يُغَطِّي رَأْسَهُ نَاسِياً أَوْ نَائِماً فَقَالَ «يُلَبِّي إِذَا ذَكَرَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2684 - Al-Halabi asked him about a person in the state of ihram who covers their head unintentionally or while sleeping.
Imam (as) said: "They should recite the Talbiyah when they remember."
